qry:define.declare: <PARAMETERS oi_personal_emp="1" chkDatosPersonales="1" chkDatosPrincipales="1" report="htmlgen_flow_49682008052117000732.html" chkDatosReferenciales="1" chkDatosContrato="1" chkDocumentos="1" chkRelLaboral="1" chkDomicilios="1" chkAfiliacion="1" chkEstudios="1" chkPosicion="1" chkIdiomas="1" chkUniOrg="1" chkCursos="1" chkBsCargo="1" chkCompetencias="1" chkEPP="1" chkAntecedentesLab="1" chkUniformes="1" chkDatosFam="1" chkBeneficios="1" chkIngresos="1" />
qry:define.name: QRY_IMAGEN

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_foto FROM PER01_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_logotipo FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW
